packaging_verification.name: build_distributions
packaging_verification.purpose: build release-facing sdist and wheel artifacts

packaging_verification.name: wheel_install_release_check
packaging_verification.command: install built wheel in a fresh venv and run coglang manifest/release-check
packaging_verification.purpose: verify installed wheel exposes release-facing CLI and public assets

packaging_verification.name: wheel_install_smoke
packaging_verification.command: install built wheel with minimal dev checks in a fresh venv and run coglang smoke
packaging_verification.purpose: verify installed wheel can complete the minimal runtime validation path

packaging_verification.name: sdist_install_release_check
packaging_verification.command: install built sdist in a fresh venv and run coglang manifest/release-check
packaging_verification.purpose: verify source distribution install path exposes release-facing CLI and public assets

packaging_verification.name: sdist_install_smoke
packaging_verification.command: install built sdist with minimal dev checks in a fresh venv and run coglang smoke
packaging_verification.purpose: verify source distribution install path can complete the minimal runtime validation path
